title: Penalty
doc_html:
§573.  Penalty

Whoever violates any of the provisions of this Part shall be fined not more than one thousand dollars or imprisoned for not more than six months, or both, for each violation.

Acts 1990, No. 23, §1; Acts 2012, No. 204, §3(A).

§573.  Penalty
Whoever violates any of the provisions of this Part shall be fined not more than one thousand dollars or imprisoned for not more than six months, or both, for each violation.
Acts 1990, No. 23, §1; Acts 2012, No. 204, §3(A).
